Class AbstractToolkit<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>>

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolkit<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The specific type of AbstractTool contained in this toolkit.
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaObjectToolkit
public abstract class AbstractToolkit<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>> extends Object
Represents a collection of related tools, parsed from a single Java class. This is the core domain model for a "toolkit".
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

    Field

    A description of the toolkit's purpose.

    Gets a list of tools that are allowed to be presented to the model.

    Calculates the total token count of this toolkit on-the-fly by aggregating the cached token counts of all its contained tools.

    Performs one-time setup after the toolkit is registered.

  • Field Details

    • toolManager

      @NonNull protected final @NonNull ToolManager toolManager
      The parent ToolManager that manages this toolkit.

    • name

      protected String name
      The name of the toolkit.

    • description

      protected String description
      A description of the toolkit's purpose.

    • defaultMaxDepth

      protected int defaultMaxDepth
      The default maximum depth policy for tools in this toolkit.

    • enabled

      protected boolean enabled
      Whether the toolkit is currently enabled.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractToolkit

      protected AbstractToolkit(@NonNull @NonNull ToolManager toolManager)
      Constructs a new AbstractToolkit.
      Parameters:
      toolManager - The parent ToolManager.

  • Method Details

    • getAllTools

      public abstract List<T> getAllTools()
      Gets all tools declared within this toolkit, regardless of their permission status.
      Returns:
      The complete list of tools.

    • getAllowedTools

      public List<T> getAllowedTools()
      Gets a list of tools that are allowed to be presented to the model. This filters out tools that have a permanent ToolPermission.DENY permission and also returns an empty list if the entire toolkit is disabled.
      Returns:
      A filtered list of allowed tools.

    • getDisabledTools

      public List<T> getDisabledTools()
      Gets a list of tools that are allowed to be presented to the model. This filters out tools that have a permanent ToolPermission.DENY permission and also returns an empty list if the entire toolkit is disabled.
      Returns:
      A filtered list of allowed tools.

    • getTokenCount

      public int getTokenCount()
      Calculates the total token count of this toolkit on-the-fly by aggregating the cached token counts of all its contained tools.
      Returns:
      The total token count for the entire toolkit.

    • getContextProvider

      public abstract ContextProvider getContextProvider()
      If this toolkit provides additional context.
      Returns:
      the context provider if any.

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Performs one-time setup after the toolkit is registered.

    • postActivate

      public void postActivate()
      Performs logic after the session has been activated and bound to the environment. Subclasses should override this to perform one-time setup that requires the entire session graph to be available.
